claim: The official smooth multiplicative prize family uses evaluation domains whose size is a power of two. Mixed-radix domains are therefore generalizations or stress tests, not required frontier inputs for the official 2-power box.

domain_family.mixed_radix_status: outside the official box unless the domain family is broadened
domain_family.repo_coset_convention: multiplicative cosets of 2-power subgroups are coordinate changes of the same 2-power-order structure

non_claims: does not prove a mixed-radix theorem
does not broaden the official prize family
quote_fragments: size is a power of two

source.description: Arnon-Boneh-Fenzi, Open Problems in List Decoding and Correlated Agreement
